reasoning: The control AC-3(1) focuses on preventing unauthorized access to information, which can be mapped to several Kubernetes security domains. RBAC controls like 'k8s_rbac_least_privilege_enforcement' ensure that users and service accounts have the minimum necessary permissions. NetworkPolicies such as 'k8s_networkpolicy_default_deny_ingress' restrict network access to only authorized entities. Enabling audit logging with 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' helps track access and modifications, ensuring unauthorized access attempts are logged. Admission controllers like 'k8s_admission_controller_pod_security_enabled' enforce security policies at the time of resource creation, preventing unauthorized or insecure configurations.
title: Access Enforcement - Passing the information to unauthorized subjects or objects;
